columns.Name: SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: CONFIRMED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag is used to determine whether submission is confirmed or not.

columns.Name: CONFIRMED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_CONFIRMED_DATE
columns.Comments: To track when the submission changed from Unconfirmed to Confirmed.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_FLAG
columns.Comments: For reporting, to know if submission was internal application, at the time it was made.

columns.Name: DISQUALIFIED_FLAG
columns.Comments: To track if submission overall was disqualified (aggregate snapshot of DQ answers).

columns.Name: MERGED_FLAG
columns.Comments: To track if the submission has been delinked/merged.

columns.Name: QSTNR_SCORE
columns.Comments: The total questionnaire score for this submission.

columns.Name: AF_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_AF_VERSIONS.AF_VERSION_ID.

columns.Name: LEGAL_DESC_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: To track the legal disclaimer accepted by the applicant. Foreign key to IRC_DESC_VERSIONS_B.DESC_VERSION_ID.

columns.Name: ESIGN_DESC_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: To track the Signature statement accepted by the applicant. Foreign key to IRC_DESC_VERSIONS_B.DESC_VERSION_ID.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the object.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_CANDIDATES table.

columns.Name: SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE
columns.Comments: Person type of the job applicant when they applied for the job

columns.Name: PIPELINE_SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the SUBMISSION_ID of the pipeline requisition's submission,  if this submission is created based on a pipeline requisition's submission.

columns.Name: IS_COMPLETED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether this submission is completed or not i.e whether the candidate completed filling this submission.

columns.Name: CURRENT_PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to IRC_PHASES_B table.

columns.Name: CURRENT_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to IRC_STATES_B table.

columns.Name: PUBLIC_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to IRC_STATES_B table. This refers to public job application status that can be shared with candidate.

columns.Name: IS_RESTRICTED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the job application is restricted to access based on the user privilage.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the Submission is active or not.

columns.Name: DISCARDED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the applicant has reapplied for the job and the current job is discarded.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date when this submission was submitted.

columns.Name: SUBM_LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the last modified date for the Submission. This is updated even when the child entitiies of the Submission table are updated. This can be used by customers to export submissions which were updated after a certain date.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the language code for the submission

columns.Name: PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to profiles table HRT_PROIFLES_B.

columns.Name: PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to process table IRC_PROCESS_B.

columns.Name: SITE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to sites table IRC_CX_SITES_B.SITE_NUMBER.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CATEGORY_CODE
columns.Comments: Extensible Flexfield Category Code

columns.Name: ADDED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person who has submitted the job application.

columns.Name: ADDED_BY_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: Source of the context through which this JA was submitted.

columns.Name: SUB_ID_CHAR
columns.Comments: This column is used to convert Long Submission Id to Char Submission Id. One of the main reason for this column to exists is to join with HRQ_QSTNR_PARTICIPANTS Table where  the SUBJECT_ID is of type varchar.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_WORK_SUMMARY
columns.Comments: Stores the work summary of job application generated by AI based on candidate input information

columns.Name: CURRENT_RANK
columns.Comments: Current rank number of current job application

columns.Name: RANKED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person id of person who ranked this job application
